home.title: Cognite's MoonShot
home.subtitleSuffix: : $100 Billion in realized customer value by 2035 - and xczxczxczhow every Cogniter helps get us there.

pathCards.title: Why does it matter to you?
pathCards.subtitle: Discover the impact

screen1.headline: What is 100 x 35?
screen1.mainContent: Cognite will deliver $100 Billion of realized customer value by 2035.
screen1.cardBody: It's our pledge to you in a world where most AI and data initiatives never reach real business impact. 100 × 35 says that Cognite is in the business of *delivering real business impact* – moving customers beyond pilots to measurable outcomes to their P&L.

screen2.headline: Realized customer value, not just potential
screen2.mainContent: Track, quantify, and prove value – at scale – across our entire customer base.
screen2.principle1Body: Impact for our customers' P&L (revenue, cost, risk, sustainability), not just internal metrics or feature usage.
screen2.principle2Body: We partner with customers to ensure quantifed outcomes, not just "feel" the improvement.
screen2.principle3Body: Value that has actually materialized in the customer's operations, not just in a slide or business case.

screen3.headline: 5 levels to track value
screen3.level1Body: Cognite's initial estimate of what a use case could deliver, used for the business case.
screen3.level2Body: The customer has reviewed and agreed to the value estimate.
screen3.level3Body: Unilateral estimate of value already realized based on early data post-deployment.
screen3.level4Body: We formally measure realized value together with the customer. Results are confidential but robust.
screen3.level5Body: The customer agrees to share the measured impact publicly – our gold standard of proof.

screen1.headline: Why 100 × 35 matters
screen1.mainContent: As AI and data become mission-critical for every industry, the cost of failure is no longer acceptable. Companies need partners who can deliver proven value, not just technology.
screen1.trueCostBody: This failure rate represents more than wasted investment—it's lost opportunity, competitive disadvantage, and eroded trust in AI/data initiatives.
screen1.bullet1: Billions in sunk costs with no ROI

screen2.headline: Value assurance is our differentiator
screen2.mainContent: While the industry struggles with a 95% failure rate, Cognite's value assurance approach ensures every initiative delivers measurable, scalable business impact.
screen2.pillar1Body: Every decision starts with business impact, not technical capability.
screen2.pillar2Body: Success is measured by enterprise-wide adoption, not proof of concept.
screen2.pillar3Body: Value is validated by the customer, not claimed by the vendor.
screen2.pillar4Body: Clear, measurable, publicly shareable evidence of business impact.

screen3.headline: Culture Shift
screen3.mainContent: 100 × 35 changes how we think and work internally. It says that "value" is not one team's responsibility – it's our shared operating system.
screen3.item1Body: Sales, product, and delivery teams now start conversations with value, not features.
screen3.item2Body: Every initiative must define its value story before receiving approval.
screen3.item3Body: Success is measured by customer value delivered, not just tasks completed.
screen3.item4Body: We celebrate validated value stories, not just product launches.

screen1.headline: How we reach $100B by 2035
screen1.mainContent: is achieved through systematic processes, rigorous measurement, and continuous learning.
screen1.milestone1Body: Launch Value Launchpad across all customer engagements. Every new project starts with defined value criteria.
screen1.milestone2Body: Achieve 50+ Level 4 value stories with validated P&L impact. Establish baseline for scaling.
screen1.milestone3Body: Deploy value tracking dashboard company-wide. Real-time visibility into all value stories across levels.
screen1.milestone4Body: Create library of 200+ replicable value blueprints. Enable rapid deployment across industries.
screen1.milestone5Body: Reach $100B in cumulative customer value. Establish Cognite as the definitive value delivery platform.

screen2.headline: It takes all of us
screen2.mainContent: Every Cogniter has a distinct role to play in 100 × 35. Here's how different roles contribute to unlocking value.

roles.title: Account Executive
roles.body: Uses the Value Launchpad to frame deals around business outcomes and ensures value is baked into SOWs.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.body: Prioritizes features that drive measurable outcomes and gives customers tools to track financial & value levers.

roles.title: Project Manager
roles.body: Runs projects against business goals, not just activity. Ensures milestones reflect impact on the customer's P&L.

roles.title: Engineer / Data Scientist
roles.body: Turns data and models into outcomes, framing results in terms of business KPIs and real-world decisions.

roles.title: CBE / TAM
roles.body: Monitors adoption and links technical performance back to agreed business outcomes.

roles.title: Marketing
roles.body: Converts Level 5 successes into public stories that prove Cognite's value assurance.

roles.title: P&O Partner
roles.body: Recruits and develops talent that thinks in terms of customer value.

roles.title: Finance Partner
roles.body: Aligns commercial models with customer success and champions rigorous value measurement.

screen3.headline: Customer value to date
screen3.subhead: Progress toward $100B realized customer value by 2035.
